name: Dynavap - Titaniu"M" Fall Colors
summary: A limited-edition all-titanium version of DynaVap's classic 'M', for patients who want the standard flame-powered vape in a more durable finish.
description: The Titanium 'M' Fall Colours is the familiar DynaVap 'M' built entirely from lightweight titanium, with a surface treatment that improves scratch resistance and grip. Two finishes are offered: NebuluM, a smooth royal-purple with blue and violet accents, and QuantiuM, a textured radiant hue. Heated with a butane torch (sold separately), it covers a 150-230C range and produces clean, flavourful vapour with no battery. At around 20g it is pocketable, repairable and built to last for years. A good entry point for patients new to flame-powered vaping who want the durability of titanium.
